name: Echo Sen (VTuber/YouTuber)
description:
Here we are. My first... eh Search that had my browser go "Want to blur this?" And I said no! It wasn't even that bad. sniff. sniff.

Anyways my second.. I think bot about a actual person! So this'll probably be a little off. But hope it's up to standards!! This lovely request was by @Mariotheman

Hope you love it! 😁

Anyways(2) yeah the character is a oc called well Echo Sen, made by a YouTuber/VTuber Gingersid go check em out fr. This description will be a little short but hey. It's the quality that matters. Not the amount.

"4 STRAIGHT YEARS!~" --- Im making this as hard I can. Guess the song I dare ya. heh. I like liking (arguably)underrated things.
creator: Cannibonnie
